title: HeadObject, GetObject, Conditions, Ranges, and Cleanup · Goroutine Forensics
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible bounded S3 download decision and cleanup flow with one identity, byte, checksum, policy, cache, ownership, cancellation, cleanup, or recovery defect; preserve the symptom and isolate first cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in bounded S3 download decision and cleanup flow and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal d…
objectives: Choose HEAD, GET, conditional GET, or a metadata database lookup without doubling requests or trusting stale authority.
Check response and metadata, own and close the body, propagate cancellation, handle partial reads, and distinguish transport from caller writes.
Map application validators and preconditions to S3 requests and preserve 304, 412, not-found, and version-specific meaning.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Download Error Boundary
steps.instruction:
Order the Download Error Boundary S3, CloudFront, and Go storage-delivery evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.

Evidence target: S3, CloudFront, and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Download Error Boundary.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Download Error Boundary assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For S3, CloudFront, and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Download Error Boundary, keep Download Error Boundary connected to executable Go storage and delivery decision evidence.

content.text: A debug Go file-delivery team handles case 8855 during a private media release. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate a versioned conditional range and prove S3 response-body cleanup; do not treat an ETag, CORS result, emulator, or successful SDK call as stronger proof than it is; then introduce a duplicate event or ambiguous response and reconcile without duplicate effect. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Classify missing key, missing version, delete marker, denied access, archive restore state, throttling, cancellation, and partial downstream response.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Download Error Boundary has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

Build deterministic Go evidence to validate a versioned conditional range and prove S3 response-body cleanup; do not treat an ETag, CORS result, emulator, or successful SDK call as stronger proof than it is; then introduce a duplicate event or ambiguous response and reconcile without duplicate effect. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Classify missing key, missing version, delete marker, denied access, archive restore state, throttling, cancellation, and partial downstream response.

For S3, CloudFront, and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Download Error Boundary, challenge the documented misconception with file, object, policy, transfer, integrity, cache, fault, cost, restore, and controlled AWS transfer evidence: Returning 404 for every S3 failure prevents information disclosure without operational cost.

options.text: Declare S3, CloudFront, and Go stakeholder outcome, file and object identity, owner, state, and byte, time, concurrency, cache, and cost budgets for the debug Download Error Boundary case
Predict S3, CloudFront, and Go authorization, custody, transfer, integrity, cache, failure, cancellation, cleanup, rollback, and recovery outcomes for the debug Download Error Boundary case
Run the smallest deterministic S3, CloudFront, and Go storage decision model and retain inspectable changed-case evidence for the debug Download Error Boundary case

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Download Error Boundary
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: storage-go-download-error-boundary-10seit" that uses case 5709 to validate a versioned conditional range and prove S3 response-body cleanup. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import AWS SDK packages, open sockets, contact S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, networks, databases, or external effects, read host state, execute host commands, or use credentials; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5 compile, vet, fuzz, race, leak, controlled AWS, load, fault, security, cost, restore, and production gates.

content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

hints: For S3, CloudFront, and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Download Error Boundary, name the stakeholder, file, object version, authorization, byte, time, concurrency, cache, cost, cleanup, and recovery boundary, Download Error Boundary precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At S3, CloudFront, and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Download Error Boundary, trace this concrete input and predict authorization, custody, integrity, range, cache, retry, cost, cleanup, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A debug Go file-delivery team handles case 7950 during a regional dependency incident. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate a versioned conditional range and prove S3 response-body cleanup; keep browser execution deterministic and move AWS claims to an authorized transfer gate; then change the object version and prove stale authority is rejected. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Classify missing key, missing version, delete marker, denied access, archive restore state, throttling, cancellation, and partial downstream response.

For S3, CloudFront, and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Download Error Boundary, challenge the documented misconception with file, object, policy, transfer, integrity, cache, fault, cost, restore, and controlled AWS transfer evidence: Returning 404 for every S3 failure prevents information disclosure without operational cost.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Download Error Boundary
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Download Error Boundary: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A debug Go file-delivery team handles case 3807 during an SDK and infrastructure canary. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate a versioned conditional range and prove S3 response-body cleanup; cap bytes, time, attempts, concurrency, and spend before starting work; then introduce a duplicate event or ambiguous response and reconcile without duplicate effect. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Classify missing key, missing version, delete marker, denied access, archive restore state, throttling, cancellation, and partial downstream response.

Evidence target: S3, CloudFront, and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Download Error Boundary.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For S3, CloudFront, and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Download Error Boundary, keep Download Error Boundary connected to executable Go storage and delivery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Classify missing key, missing version, delete marker, denied access, archive restore state, throttling, cancellation, and partial downstream response.
